data.name: Save
data.comment: Button text for saving changes

data.name: Cancel
data.comment: Button text for canceling an action

data.name: Generate
data.comment: Button tooltip for generating a random value

data.name: Delete
data.comment: Button text for deleting an item

data.name: Remove
data.comment: Button text for removing an item

data.name: TotpDefaultName
data.comment: Display-only fallback name shown for a TOTP code that has no name set

data.name: Edit
data.comment: Button text for editing an item

data.name: Duplicate
data.comment: Button text for duplicating an item

data.name: DuplicateSuccessMessage
data.comment: Success message shown after duplicating an item

data.name: DuplicateErrorMessage
data.comment: Error message shown when duplicating an item failed

data.name: ItemOptions
data.comment: Accessible label for the ellipsis button that opens the item context menu

data.name: Show
data.comment: Button text for showing content

data.name: Hide
data.comment: Button text for hiding content

data.name: Close
data.comment: Button text for closing a dialog or modal

data.name: Back
data.comment: Button text for going back

data.name: Next
data.comment: Button text for proceeding to the next step

data.name: Loading
data.comment: Loading message displayed during async operations

data.name: Yes
data.comment: Confirmation button text

data.name: No
data.comment: Rejection button text

data.name: Ok
data.comment: OK button text

data.name: Continue
data.comment: Button text to continue with an action

data.name: Confirm
data.comment: Button text to confirm an action

data.name: Refresh
data.comment: Button text to refresh content

data.name: Email
data.comment: Label for email input field

data.name: Password
data.comment: Label for password input field

data.name: Username
data.comment: Label for username input field

data.name: Name
data.comment: Label for name input field

data.name: Description
data.comment: Label for description input field

data.name: Title
data.comment: Label for title input field

data.name: Website
data.comment: Label for website input field

data.name: Search
data.comment: Label for search input field

data.name: ErrorGeneric
data.comment: Generic error message

data.name: ErrorUnknown
data.value: Tharla earráid anaithnid. Déan iarracht arís.
data.comment: Generic unknown error message

data.name: VaultTooLargeError
data.value: Tá an cruinneachán rómhór don fhreastalaí le glacadh leis. Bain triail as roinnt míreanna nó ceangaltán a bhaint chun an méid a laghdú agus déan iarracht arís.
data.comment: Shown when the server rejects a vault upload with HTTP 413 because the encrypted vault exceeds the configured upload size limit

data.name: VaultSaveError
data.value: Theip ar athruithe a shábháil sa chruinneachán. Déan iarracht arís.
data.comment: Generic error shown when a vault save / sync to the server fails for an unexpected reason

data.name: ErrorValidation
data.value: Ceartaigh na hearráidí thíos le do thoil.
data.comment: Validation error message

data.name: ErrorRequired
data.comment: Required field validation error

data.name: ErrorInvalidEmail
data.value: Cuir isteach seoladh ríomhphoist bailí le do thoil.
data.comment: Invalid email validation error

data.name: ErrorPasswordMismatch
data.comment: Password confirmation mismatch error

data.name: Success
data.comment: Success status message

data.name: Warning
data.comment: Warning status message

data.name: Error
data.comment: Error status message

data.name: Info
data.comment: Information status message

data.name: RefreshPageText
data.value: Más cosúil go bhfuil an luchtú i bhfostú, is féidir leat cliceáil ar an gcnaipe thíos chun an leathanach a athnuachan.
data.comment: Text shown above refresh button on loading screen

data.name: ErrorPasswordMinLength
data.value: Ní mór don phasfhocal nua a bheith 10 gcarachtar ar a laghad.
data.comment: Error message for password minimum length validation

data.name: ErrorPasswordsDoNotMatch
data.comment: Error message when password confirmation doesn't match

data.name: ErrorPasswordMinLengthGeneric
data.value: Ní mór don phasfhocal a bheith 10 gcarachtar ar a laghad.
data.comment: Generic error message for password minimum length validation

data.name: ErrorPasswordsDoNotMatchGeneric
data.comment: Generic error message when passwords don't match

data.name: ErrorMustAcceptTerms
data.value: Ní mór duit glacadh leis na téarmaí agus coinníollacha.
data.comment: Error message for terms and conditions acceptance

data.name: ErrorSecretKeyRequired
data.comment: Error message when secret key is required

data.name: ErrorUsernameRequired
data.comment: Error message when username is required

data.name: ErrorPasswordRequired
data.comment: Error message when password is required

data.name: Or
data.comment: Divider text between options

data.name: LockVault
data.comment: Tooltip text for lock vault button

data.name: Home
data.comment: Home breadcrumb text

data.name: Notes
data.comment: Notes section heading

data.name: SyncVaultData
data.comment: Tooltip text for sync vault data button

data.name: SyncingChanges
data.comment: Status text when background sync is in progress

data.name: LoadingVault
data.comment: Status text when vault is being loaded

data.name: EmailFormatHtml
data.comment: Email format switcher: HTML view button. Shared between email modal and email page.

data.name: EmailFormatPlain
data.comment: Email format switcher: plain text view button. Shared between email modal and email page.

data.name: EmailFormatSource
data.comment: Email format switcher: raw HTML source view button. Shared between email modal and email page.

data.name: EmailFormatSwitchTitle
data.comment: Tooltip for the cycle button that switches between HTML / Text / Source views. Shared between email modal and email page.

data.name: EmailItemLabel
data.comment: Label for the credential/item row in the email header. Shared between email modal and email page.

data.name: EmailItemNone
data.comment: Shown next to the Item label when an email is not linked to any credential. Shared between email modal and email page.
